allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('notebooks/02_attack_dev.ipynb','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); cells=nb['cells']; print\('Total cells:', len\(cells\)\); [print\(i, c['cell_type'], \(''.join\(c['source']\) if isinstance\(c['source'],list\) else c['source']\)[:90].replace\('\\n',' | '\)\) for i,c in enumerate\(cells[-15:]\)]")
